response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows via MCP tooling, and a proven track record in distributed systems and open-source architecture — but lacks explicit evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing real-time credit/liquidity systems required for the CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Proven expertise in event-driven, distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source tooling)
concerns: No clear evidence of leading teams from 10 to 30+ engineers or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lacks demonstrable production experience in fintech infrastructure (credit risk, working capital, compliance)
No mention of model-agnostic AI architecture, observability for agents, or regulatory AI governance frameworks
